meaning: vt.译解(密码等),解释n.密电译文
examples: The Coast Guard needs to decipher garbled messages in a few minutes.
No math, no more squinting at the fine print and trying to decipher those words with no vowels.
It would probably take a new post to try and decipher this possibility I suppose.
The manuscript helped nuns decipher parts of the bible and is being exhibited at Lacock Abbey.
